name: River Grove Golf Lounge
about: River Grove Golf Lounge is a modern golf simulation venue that combines the sport with a social lounge atmosphere. The facility offers a secure checkout process and accepts multiple payment methods, including major credit cards and digital wallets like Apple Pay and Google Pay. While specific technical details about the simulators are not provided on the website, the venue appears designed for casual and social golf experiences.
why_golfers_like_it: Modern golf simulation with a social lounge atmosphere
Convenient payment options including digital wallets
Suitable for both casual play and corporate events
Community-oriented environment for golfers of all skill levels

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available for food service
Full bar with cocktails and other beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available at the venue, but you can also bring your own equipment if preferred.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar, so outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1-2 hours depending on simulator usage and group size.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, River Grove Golf Lounge welcomes families and has a casual atmosphere suitable for juniors.
